text: It is well accepted that alterations in synaptic transmission and plasticity contribute to deficits in cognitive function. There are a few studies that have linked exposure to TPO inhibitors (e.g., PTU, MMI) and well as iodine deficient diets, to changes in serum TH levels and have measured both alterations in both synaptic function and cognitive behaviors (Opazo et al., 2009; Dong et al., 2005; Gilbert, 2011; Gilbert and Sui, 2006).
